content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.91% breaking below 24000, Bank Nifty -0.79%, PSU Banks -1.91%, Realty -2.39%, Auto -1.28%, Energy -1.41% — broad risk-off with India VIX +7.84% to 18.16 (4-month high). Only Pharma (+0.63%) and IT (+0.22%) green. CPI data tomorrow (May 12) plus DRREDDY/CIPLA earnings create event risk. Defensive sectors holding the book intact (COFORGE +9.6%, MARICO +3.3%, LAURUSLABS +3.7% are working); priority is trailing SLs to lock gains rather than fresh admits into rising VIX.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23850,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF defensive hedge with VIX spiking. CMP 123.59 above SL 121. Bullish research (+0.08 modifier) on Middle East tensions / safe-haven flows. Hold as portfolio hedge; SL 121 below 20-DMA support."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.3% unrealized at 845.95, breakout to 52-week high. Trail SL from 835 to 838 (still 1.0% below CMP, preserves recovery room; Rule trail-gap respected). Strong Q4 print, FMCG defensive rotation working."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.6% biggest winner, CMP 1383.20. Current SL 1360 (-1.7% from CMP). Trail tighter to 1365 (-1.3% from CMP, still respects 1.0% gap floor). Q4 PAT +134%, Cigniti synergies, $1.75B order book — thesis intact, lock in most of the gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5% at 2793.60, SL 2740 (-1.9% buffer). FY26 PAT +47%, Refrigerants Odisha capex doubled — bullish thesis intact. Hold SL where it is; not at +2% threshold to trail to breakeven yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% at 9068, near 52w high with 3.3x volume. SL 8950 (-1.3% from CMP). Q4 revenue +27%, brokerage upgrades to Rs 10,500. Hold; not yet at trail trigger."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5% at 10601, SL 10440 (-1.5% buffer). Buyback at Rs 12000 = price floor, dividend Rs 150, record date May 29. Hold; SL is adequately calibrated, Rule 17 — respect the SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6% at 478.40, SL 470 (-1.8% buffer). Q4 PAT +16%, hair care +27%, management raised FY27 guidance. Thesis intact, respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.7% at 1270, FY26 PAT +148%, near ATH. Current SL already at 1255 (-1.2% from CMP). No-op — keep current. Actually leave as-is; emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.7% at 1250.50, SL 1198 (-4.2% buffer, wider). Q4 beat +8.58% intraday breakout. Not at trail threshold yet (need +2%). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4% at 862.60, near ATH 874.20, order book +61% YoY. SL 850 (-1.5% from CMP). Hold; respect calibrated SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at 8081, near 52w high. Q4 results May 20 — binary event 7 sessions out, NOT within 3-session window so Rule 11 not triggered. SL 7950 (-1.6%). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at 1871.70, sector leader today +2.03%, near 52w high. Q4 board mid-May — outside 3-session window currently. SL 1830 (-2.2%). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5% at 1648.50, faded from intraday high 1698. SL 1610 (-2.3% buffer). Q4 PAT -15% YoY was the red flag but already in price; respect SL per Rule 17."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge on rising VIX"},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 838.00, "reasoning": "Lock gain at ATH, trail to 838 maintaining 1% gap"},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1365.00, "reasoning": "Largest winner +9.6%, tighten SL while preserving 1.3% gap"},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Below trail threshold"},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Below trail threshold"},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor near; respect SL"},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Thesis intact, respect SL"},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already at 1255 = 1.2% gap, no change needed"},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Below +2% trail threshold"},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Respect calibrated SL"},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 result May 20 outside 3-session window"},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Pharma leader today; respect SL"},
    {"symbol": "LALPATHLAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Don't front-run SL"}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH-rated candidates rejected this cycle with rationale: (1) BIOCON — neutral rating (-0.03 modifier), CEO/CFO transitions add execution risk, Q4 mixed, reject on conviction. (2) TORNTPHARM / KOTAKBANK / THERMAX / MCX / UPL / INFY / HCLTECH — late session (14:13, 76 min to close), VIX +7.84% spiking into binary CPI print tomorrow, and deployment already at 52% with 11 positions including pharma exposure (SUNPHARMA, LAURUSLABS, LALPATHLAB, APOLLOHOSP = 4-name healthcare cluster already at cap limit per Rule 10). Adding a 5th healthcare/pharma name would breach cluster discipline. (3) NIFTYBEES — Nifty broke 24000, not a defensive buy on a breakdown day. (4) TATACONSUM pending LIMIT BUY at 1240 from earlier is now mis-priced (CMP 1250.50 above limit) — leave to expire/fill if it dips; do not re-emit. Real reason for zero admits: rising VIX into CPI tomorrow + healthcare cluster already maxed + 5-day P&L -₹32K signals defensive posture is correct, not anchoring.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 52%, cash 48% — below soft 80% target but justified by VIX spike +7.84%, CPI binary tomorrow, weak 5-day win rate (12%). Cancel-recommend: HFCL MIS LIMIT BUY at 133.50 has been OPEN 7766 minutes (~5 days) — stale, thesis dead. Will emit cancel next cycle if still pending. Today's realized P&L -₹28,429 already large; unrealized +₹4,411 net. Daily loss buffer remaining ₹49K — adequate. Focus: protect COFORGE +9.6% gain via tightened trail, let other positions work to their calibrated SLs without preemptive exits (Rule 17). Tomorrow CPI print will be the macro trigger — preserve dry powder to deploy reactively post-print rather than into the event."
}
